title: Service Layer — Gadget API
description:
### Your Task

Build a Gadget CRUD API with the 3-layer pattern. Third rep — should be muscle memory now.

### Requirements

- `Gadget` entity: `id` (Long), `name` (String), `brand` (String), `category` (String), `price` (Double), `available` (Boolean)
- `GadgetRepository` extending `JpaRepository`
- `GadgetService` with all CRUD methods
- `GadgetController` at `/api/gadgets`

### Endpoints

- `GET /api/gadgets` → all (200)
- `GET /api/gadgets/{id}` → by ID (200 or 404)
- `POST /api/gadgets` → create (201)
- `PUT /api/gadgets/{id}` → update (200 or 404)
- `DELETE /api/gadgets/{id}` → delete (204 or 404)
hints: By now you know the drill: @Service, constructor injection, 3 layers
Try to write this one without looking at the previous challenges
